programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When devoted girlfriends are murderously attacked in their Park Slope Brooklyn home, the NYPD doubts the surviving partner's story; these suspicions outrage members of the LGBTQ community who demand the real killer be found.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a young banker disappears, police piece together her final moments, leading them to a professional who's not as he presents himself.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a beloved Queens gay man, a community bands together while a detective goes under cover to catch the killers.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: A young woman steps out of her local deli only to be never seen again; when she's reported missing days later, detectives from Staten Island find themselves mired in a maze of suspects and tracing her last steps before it's too late.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: When a patrol officer discovers a dead body in the back of a taxi, detectives must rely on a trail of digital breadcrumbs and a mysterious passenger to track the killer.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: When a Philly radio personality is killed in her lavish Shore home, the years-long investigation reveals an undercover informant, an intricate murder-for-hire plot, and a vast trafficking conspiracy.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: In the early morning hours after Valentine's Day, a man is found dead after an apparent drug overdose; but a jail informant gives investigators a tip that abruptly changes the case, and a deadly pattern of deaths in the family is revealed.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Killer Relationship With Faith Jenkins
programme.desc: After 25 years of a mostly beautiful marriage, a woman loses her husband in a brutal killing inside their own home; what at first seems to be a robbery-gone-bad is revealed to be a vicious and carefully plotted murder.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: When a Philly radio personality is killed in her lavish Shore home, the years-long investigation reveals an undercover informant, an intricate murder-for-hire plot, and a vast trafficking conspiracy.

programme.title: Final Moments
programme.desc: When soon-to-be college freshman Heather Maples is discovered murdered in her own bed, investigators discover a remarkable clue preserved at the scene.

programme.title: Final Moments
programme.desc: After asking to drop off a book off at a friend's house, 15-year-old Danielle Locklear never returns home, but a cryptic clue leads investigators to a secluded creek.

programme.title: Final Moments
programme.desc: In 2013, college sophomore Alyssiah Wiley is spotted on surveillance footage leaving Eastern Connecticut University campus, then she disappears; authorities follow a digital trail of clues.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Susie Casey, an outgoing mother of four, is going through a divorce when she vanishes; police investigate three men.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Police investigate three men in the life of Susie Casey, an outgoing mother of four going through a divorce, who was 20 steps from her front door when she vanished.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Rachel Anderson is a vivacious single mother whose world revolves around her children, then she fails to show up for work one day; her disappearance may have something to do do with the terrifying telephone calls she's been receiving.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Karen and Mark Duenas manage to keep the romance alive even after raising five sons, then an ordinary night ends in a tragic murder that will test the bonds of family.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Lurking in the woods and peeping through windows, a cold-blooded serial killer stalks his next victim.

programme.title: Mysteries and Scandals
programme.sub-title: Aaron Hernandez, McNair & Dele: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: The lives and crimes of Aaron Hernandez, Bison Dele, and Steve McNair, whose professional sports careers brought wealth, fame and love of millions but didn't protect them from crime.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered
programme.desc: The untold true story of NFL superstar Aaron Hernandez from the viewpoint of those who knew him best strips away the layers to answer the many questions left behind after Hernandez's tragic death.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered
programme.desc: Aaron's fiancée and close friends discuss the struggle to accept Aaron's new reality behind bars. Through the murder trial of Odin Lloyd, sisters are torn apart and a conviction seals Aaron's fate. Finally Aaron's darkest secret is revealed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: When a patrol officer discovers a dead body in the back of a taxi, detectives must rely on a trail of digital breadcrumbs and a mysterious passenger to track the killer.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: When a Philly radio personality is killed in her lavish Shore home, the years-long investigation reveals an undercover informant, an intricate murder-for-hire plot, and a vast trafficking conspiracy.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A respected family man is found shot to death in his upscale California home. As detectives race to find his killer, a startling confession exposes a web of lies, allegations of abuse, and a marriage pushed to its breaking point.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A farmer is gunned down inside his Barron County, Wisconsin home in what appears to be a planned hit. As investigators search for answers, they turn to an unstable ex whose plot to kill shocks the rural community.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A beloved mother is fatally shot after a feud between two other women escalates into a group fight. Pine Bluff authorities interview witnesses to uncover the shooter's true motive as public opinion on the case grows increasingly divided.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Just months after a shooting nearly takes her life, a New Jersey woman is reported missing. Fearing her original attacker has returned to finish the job, investigators race to expose an elaborate murder plot and an obsessive killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: When a beloved mom is murdered in her suburban Connecticut basement, and her husband is found zip-tied to a chair, detectives pursue a camo-clad intruder and a twisted trail of digital evidence that uncovers a diabolical plan, months in the making.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A young mother claims she was caught up in her boyfriend's murderous plan.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Just months after a shooting nearly takes her life, a New Jersey woman is reported missing. Fearing her original attacker has returned to finish the job, investigators race to expose an elaborate murder plot and an obsessive killer.

programme.desc: When a beloved mom is murdered in her suburban Connecticut basement, and her husband is found zip-tied to a chair, detectives pursue a camo-clad intruder and a twisted trail of digital evidence that uncovers a diabolical plan, months in the making.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard
programme.desc: A late-night gaming party goes dangerously wrong when a young teenager disappears from the coastal town of Everett, WA.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: They say deaths come in three, but when a young woman falls ill after eerily similar deaths of her father and brother, suspicion turns to a family member and the limits of a mother's love.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: In a shocking turn of events, a mother must face her demons when her daughter gets left for dead after a vicious murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Rebecca gives up her single life to marry Larry, but after Rebecca comes home and finds Larry in a pool of his own blood, fingers start to point back to her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: After following Laci Peterson's case for more than 15 years, the show delivers a comprehensive report with rarely seen interrogation video, new insight from prosecutors, and surprising details from Amber Frey, who helped uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: After following Laci Peterson's case for more than 15 years, the show delivers a comprehensive report with rarely seen interrogation video, new insight from prosecutors, and surprising details from Amber Frey, who helped uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Michele Lewis' new boyfriend seems almost too good to be true, then she discovers he is a con man harboring dark secrets and embarks on a dangerous mission to expose him.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A mother is found dead in a house fire, but an autopsy reveals a brutal murder; the case goes cold until an unexpected confession sheds new light; Blayne Alexander looks back at a family shattered by loss, but determined to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Two murders in Toronto ignite an investigation that spans four decades, but breakthroughs in investigative genetic genealogy help crack the case; Josh Mankiewicz revisits the mystery that took him to the coldest and most remote place he's ever been.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: Just five days before her elaborate Long Island wedding, a beautiful and brilliant Yale student goes missing; a massive search effort is launched to find her before her wedding day.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: A mysterious illness strikes a newly married electrician, and his condition gets increasingly dire as doctors search for answers; it will take a scientific breakthrough to solve this burning mystery and catch a cunning killer.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: A romantic anniversary getaway for a couple of high school sweethearts turns disastrous when they become victims of a robbery gone wrong; homicide investigators unravel a lurid secret at the heart of the murder, leading them to a stone-cold killer.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: While a young couple enjoy a romantic honeymoon, a brutal sexual assault and murder occurs; investigators must navigate a web of lies, suspects, and clues to bring a charismatic killer to justice.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: A pregnant day care worker is savagely attacked and murdered before her wedding in Mississippi; police must match their wits with a devious killer and untangle a case complicated by a lurid love affair.
